text: Cable Current Carrying Capacity (75°C Thermoplastic, single core, in conduit): 1.5mm² - 13.5A; 2.5mm² - 18A; 4mm² - 25A; 6mm² - 32A; 10mm² - 44A; 16mm² - 60A; 25mm² - 80A; 35mm² - 100A. Note: Derating factors apply for multiple circuits and ambient temperature above 30°C.

Maximum Circuit Lengths (metres) for 5% voltage drop at 230V - 10A load: 1.5mm² - 36m; 2.5mm² - 61m; 4mm² - 97m; 6mm² - 146m. For 16A load: 1.5mm² - 23m; 2.5mm² - 38m; 4mm² - 61m; 6mm² - 91m. For 20A load: 1.5mm² - 18m; 2.5mm² - 30m; 4mm² - 48m; 6mm² - 73m.

Minimum Switchboard Working Clearances: Front access - 1000mm width, 600mm depth; Rear access (if required) - 800mm width, 600mm depth; Side access - 500mm minimum. Height clearance minimum 2000mm. Doors must open to minimum 90 degrees without obstruction.

Earth Electrode Resistance Requirements by Installation Type: Residential - maximum 100 ohms; Commercial - maximum 50 ohms; Industrial - maximum 10 ohms; Medical locations - maximum 2 ohms; Data centres - maximum 1 ohm. Testing required annually for commercial and industrial installations.

RCD Selection Guide by Application: General socket outlets - Type A or Type AC, 30mA; Wet areas - Type A, 30mA, IP66; EV charging - Type B, 30mA; Solar installations - Type B, 300mA; Industrial machinery - Type A, 100mA or 300mA depending on equipment earthing.
